Your full agency sales process — customize every step, add cases, delete or reorder.

Live snapshot of your team — activity, outreach counts, and access at a glance.
Member Access Control
Set exactly which pages and sections each member can access. CEO and CMO have full access by default.
Team Members & Access
⚡ Connect Supabase Backend
Enable cloud sync, multi-device login, and real-time data across all team members.
Step-by-Step Setup
1. Go to supabase.com → Create New Project
2. Settings → API → copy Project URL
3. Copy anon public key
4. Open this HTML file in a text editor
5. Replace YOUR_SUPABASE_URL and YOUR_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
6. Run the SQL schema below in Supabase SQL Editor
7. Enable Email auth in Supabase → Authentication → Providers
What You Get
✓ All team members login with email + password
✓ Leads, clients, data synced in real-time
✓ CEO controls who sees what pages
✓ Activity log tracks every action
✓ Password reset via email
✓ Works on all devices simultaneously
SQL Schema — Run in Supabase SQL Editor 
Loading SQL schema...

Control when and how AxxroDesk notifies you. Turning off "All Notifications" disables both in-app and push notifications.

🔔 Notifications
Control in-app and push notifications. Turning off the master switch disables everything.

📋 Leads & WhatsApp Settings
Control phone click behavior, WhatsApp integration, auto-messages, and lead features.
💬 WhatsApp Integration
Phone Click Action
WhatsApp Platform
Auto-Message on WA Click (use {name} for lead name, {niche} for their niche)
Test WA Click (uses your settings above):
📋 Lead Table Features
Default Follow-up Days (after logging action)
🗂 Kanban Pipeline Stages
Customize your pipeline stages for the Kanban view. Drag to reorder.
💬 AI DM Flow Settings
Control tone, pitch style, and message behavior for AI-generated DMs. Generated messages can auto-redirect to WhatsApp.
💬 WhatsApp Auto-Redirect
Send AI DM directly via WhatsApp
When enabled: AI message generate hote hi ek "💬 Send via WhatsApp" button appear hoga. Click karo — message auto-fill hokar WA pe open ho jaega. Alag se copy/paste ki zaroorat nahi.
💡
Flow: Lead pe click → AI DM modal → Type select (Cold/Followup/etc.) → AI generate → Send via WhatsApp button → message WA pe pre-filled open

ON
Active AI Provider
Keys stored locally — never sent to any server except the AI provider directly.
🖼 Image Generation APIs

Data Management
Clear all saved posts, stats, keys, and settings from your browser.
Ax Axai Engine — Dedicated CRM AI
Your personal AI brain — separate from Studio. Powers Axai Chat V2 Pro. Free & fast.
Not Connected
Add a Groq key below to activate Axai Engine
⚡
Groq — Recommended (FREE)
Llama 3.3 70B · Blazing fast · Free tier generous · No credit card needed
Not Set
Get free key → console.groq.com  |  Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
🔀
OpenRouter — Fallback (FREE models available)
Used if Groq is unavailable · 50+ models · Gemini 2.0 Flash free
Not Set
Get free key → openrouter.ai
⚙ Engine Model
Groq models need Groq key. OpenRouter models need OpenRouter key.
How Axai Engine works:
• Keys saved locally — never leave your browser
• Axai Chat V2 Pro uses Engine first, then falls back to Studio provider
• Groq is free with generous limits (~14,400 requests/day)
• Engine model is separate from Studio content generation model
